'''dojapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:imaginate|imaginate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-j-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imaginate|imaginate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dojapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dojapithi|dojapithi]] || [[word:dojapiji|dojapiji]] || [[word:dojapishi|dojapishi]] || [[word:dojapiki|dojapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dojaputhuthu|dojaputhuthu]] || [[word:dojapujuju|dojapujuju]] || [[word:dojapushushu|dojapushushu]] || [[word:dojapukuku|dojapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dojaputhu|dojaputhu]] || [[word:dojapuju|dojapuju]] || [[word:dojapushu|dojapushu]] || [[word:dojapuku|dojapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dojapufthuf|dojapufthuf]] || [[word:dojapufjuf|dojapufjuf]] || [[word:dojapufshuf|dojapufshuf]] || [[word:dojapufkuf|dojapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dojapethe|dojapethe]] || [[word:dojapeje|dojapeje]] || [[word:dojapeshe|dojapeshe]] || [[word:dojapeke|dojapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dojapothotho|dojapothotho]] || [[word:dojapojojo|dojapojojo]] || [[word:dojaposhosho|dojaposhosho]] || [[word:dojapokoko|dojapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dojapotho|dojapotho]] || [[word:dojapojo|dojapojo]] || [[word:dojaposho|dojaposho]] || [[word:dojapoko|dojapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dojapofthof|dojapofthof]] || [[word:dojapofjof|dojapofjof]] || [[word:dojapofshof|dojapofshof]] || [[word:dojapofkof|dojapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dojapÃŸfthÃŸf|dojapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dojapÃŸfjÃŸf|dojapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dojapÃŸfshÃŸf|dojapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dojapÃŸfkÃŸf|dojapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dojapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|dojapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dojapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|dojapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dojapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|dojapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dojapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|dojapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dojapÃŸfthÃŸf|dojapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dojapÃŸfjÃŸf|dojapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dojapÃŸfshÃŸf|dojapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dojapÃŸfkÃŸf|dojapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dojapÃŸfthÃŸf|dojapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dojapÃŸfjÃŸf|dojapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dojapÃŸfshÃŸf|dojapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dojapÃŸfkÃŸf|dojapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dojapÃḊthÃḊ|dojapÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:dojapÃḊjÃḊ|dojapÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:dojapÃḊshÃḊ|dojapÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:dojapÃḊkÃḊ|dojapÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dojapathatha|dojapathatha]] || [[word:dojapajaja|dojapajaja]] || [[word:dojapashasha|dojapashasha]] || [[word:dojapakaka|dojapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dojapatha|dojapatha]] || [[word:dojapaja|dojapaja]] || [[word:dojapasha|dojapasha]] || [[word:dojapaka|dojapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dojapafthaf|dojapafthaf]] || [[word:dojapafjaf|dojapafjaf]] || [[word:dojapafshaf|dojapafshaf]] || [[word:dojapafkaf|dojapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dojapasha|dojapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dojapshÃḋsha|dojapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dojaprosha|dojaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dojapmusha|dojapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dojapyasha|dojapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godojapnkshÃḋsha|godojapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godojapnkrosha|godojapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godojapnkmusha|godojapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godojapnkyasha|godojapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dojajapasha|dojajapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dojajapshÃḋsha|dojajapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dojajaprosha|dojajaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dojajapmusha|dojajapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dojajapyasha|dojajapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godojajapnkshÃḋsha|godojajapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godojajapnkrosha|godojajapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godojajapnkmusha|godojajapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godojajapnkyasha|godojajapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dejÃḊpasha|dejÃḊpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dejÃḊpshÃḋsha|dejÃḊpshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dejÃḊprosha|dejÃḊprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dejÃḊpmusha|dejÃḊpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dejÃḊpyasha|dejÃḊpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godejÃḊpnkshÃḋsha|godejÃḊpnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godejÃḊpnkrosha|godejÃḊpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godejÃḊpnkmusha|godejÃḊpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godejÃḊpnkyasha|godejÃḊpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dojfapasha|dojfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dojfapshÃḋsha|dojfapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dojfaprosha|dojfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dojfapmusha|dojfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dojfapyasha|dojfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godojfapnkshÃḋsha|godojfapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godojfapnkrosha|godojfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godojfapnkmusha|godojfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godojfapnkyasha|godojfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
